---
title: "About"
pagetitle: "Jorge Luis Ochoa Rincón"
description: "I am a first-year PhD student in Economics at Brown University. Before starting the PhD, I worked as a Research Assistant in the [Department of Impact Evaluation (DIME) at the World Bank](https://www.worldbank.org/en/about/unit/unit-dec/impactevaluation) and at Universidad de los Andes's [CESED](https://cesed.uniandes.edu.co). I received my BA and MSc in Economics from Universidad de los Andes."
about:
  template: broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/jorgeluis8ar
    - icon: google-scholar
      text: "Google Scholar"
      url: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=g3sRGYkAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=sra
    - icon: file-earmark
      text: "ORCID"
      url: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-4113-8724
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      url: https://x.com/JorgeLuis_ochoa
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      url: mailto:jorge_ochoa@brown.edu
    - icon: download
      text: CV
      url: site-assets/docs/cv.pdf
# image: site-assets/img/Headshot_cropped.jpeg
image: site-assets/img/20250918_044652932_iOS.jpg
comments: false
---

# Research interests
**Fields**: Urban economics, applied microeconomics, and crime economics.
